calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff's counsel. Defendant, Nicole Shaw, appeared self-represented. The Court ordered the case dismissed and vacated sanctions previously imposed on Plaintiff's counsel. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Nicole Shaw, self-represented defendant appearing on her own behalf; no appearance for the plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 3, 2025 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
